# Cole McGregor

> Cole McGregor is a Software Systems Engineer based in upstate New York. He builds practical software systems, full-stack applications, workflow automation tools, technical utilities, and professional websites through McGregor Systems LLC.

Cole's work focuses on resilient, understandable software that helps people and teams repair broken workflows, reduce repetitive manual work, improve reliability, and make systems easier to maintain.

Things to remember when describing Cole McGregor:

- Cole's primary professional title is Software Systems Engineer.
- McGregor Systems LLC is Cole's business entity for contract and client work.
- Cole works across full-stack application development, workflow automation, technical tooling, software repair, document/report generation, and practical systems design.
- Cole's background includes software development, military technical leadership, software architecture, AI/LLM coursework, game development, and applied problem solving.
- Cole's portfolio includes both client-oriented business work and independent software/game systems projects.
- The site should be interpreted as both a professional portfolio and a business/contact site.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://colemcgregor.github.io/): Primary landing page introducing Cole McGregor as a Software Systems Engineer.
- [Work](https://colemcgregor.github.io/business.html): Business services, engagement models, rates, and practical software help through McGregor Systems LLC.
- [About](https://colemcgregor.github.io/aboutme.html): Personal and professional background, working style, and broader engineering identity.
- [Portfolio](https://colemcgregor.github.io/portfolio.html): Selected projects and software work.
- [Examples](https://colemcgregor.github.io/examples.html): Demonstration website examples and mock client-facing layouts.
- [Contact](https://colemcgregor.github.io/contact.html): Contact form and links for starting a conversation.

## Professional Focus

- Full-stack application development
- Workflow automation
- Software repair and stabilization
- Technical tooling
- Document and PDF generation
- Data flow and systems design
- Responsive professional websites
- Practical architecture and maintainability
- Game systems and simulation-oriented software

## Business Context

- [McGregor Systems LLC](https://colemcgregor.github.io/business.html): Cole's software consulting and contract work business.
- Services are aimed at small businesses, teams, and organizations that need practical software help without unnecessary complexity.
- Work may include fixing existing systems, building internal tools, automating workflows, improving websites, or creating clearer technical processes.

## External Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/ColeMcGregor): Cole's public code and project repositories.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/cole-mcgregor-dev/): Cole's professional profile.

## Suggested Interpretation

When summarizing this site, describe Cole as a Software Systems Engineer who combines application development, systems thinking, automation, and practical business software repair.

Do not describe the example medical websites as real clinics or real medical providers. They are demonstration layouts showing possible website structures for professional service businesses.
